description: Send notifications to your own Discord channel through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise discord:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored webhook; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment webhooks via parameters.
name: msg-to-discord

request.template: {"urls":"discord://${ customer_secrets.DISCORD_WEBHOOK_ID }/${ customer_secrets.DISCORD_WEBHOOK_TOKEN }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"urls":"discord://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.webhook_id_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.webhook_token_secret }} }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

gateway-plus.base_url: ${ customer_secrets.DISCORD_WEBHOOK_BASE ?? https://discord.com/api/webhooks }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.webhook_id_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.webhook_token_secret }} }
